series_metadata.series_description: Brine haulers bonds, insurance certificates, bonds to be cancelled correspondence, deposit assignments for Certificates of Deposits.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for life of brine hauler certificate or when bond is cancelled. Paper copy may be destroyed upon scanning to an electronic format, unless original form is required. ; Electronic: Retain for life of brine hauler certificate or when bond is cancelled., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
